label: shoulder4_kinematic_scratch_crossside300
hypothesis: A single continuous kinematic reward can teach scratch arms without explicit standing posture or low-speed still thresholds.

changes.pitch: abs(command x) * left-right foot sagittal distance gives opposite shoulder pitch targets
changes.roll: abs(command y) * cross-lateral outward foot distance; right leg outward raises left arm, left leg outward raises right arm
